{{Quote|Kaan rules!|LaTor's traditional salute for Skere Kaan|<ref name="JK" />}}
'''LaTor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in service to [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan|Kaan]] and his [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]]. 
==Biography==
LaTor was Number Five in the Brotherhood's hierarchy, but during the last weeks of the [[Ruusan campaign]], Kaan's number two, three, and four fell in battle against the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. LaTor took their place next to the<ref name="JK" /> [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]].<ref name="PoD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref>

In the aftermath of the disastrous [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]], he was wounded and half of his place was covered with a bandage. He retreated with Kaan in the caverns of a valley that would later be known as the [[Valley of the Jedi]]. Kaan felt the arrival of the Jedi troops to demand the surrender of their remnants. LaTor confirmed it, and answered to his Lord that there was no alternate strategy, no other way to stop them. Still, Kaan would never surrender. Under his orders, LaTor spent the next two [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to assemble the two thousand [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] that remained of their Army; a fact that proved their superior intelligence and power than of those who had already perished.<ref name="JK" />

Kaan gave his final speech to the crowd assembled by LaTor, and instructed the creation of a new weapon that would eradicate the Jedi, and the Brotherhood as well. LaTor sealed the speech by shouting the salute to Kaan, which the Dark Jedi repeated. LaTor joined the thousand powerful minds that used the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] to make a construct that created the [[thought bomb]]<ref name="JK" />

==Legacy==
When [[Kyle Katarn]] experienced a dream of the past after he was knocked unconscious during later [[Mission to Ruusan|events on Ruusan]], Katarn was impressed by his strength in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="JK" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{1st}} {{Flash}}
